steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, under Articles open Products and find the product.
Click the editing (pencil) icon next to the product.
Open the Product codes tab in the left-hand menu.
Enter your codes in the fields - barcodes (EAN), PLU numbers, or other unique identifiers.
Click + Add product code to create additional fields as needed.
Review the Product code alias section below to see where a code is already used and avoid duplicates.
Click Save to apply the changes.
Then send provisioning via General, the sub-category General, and Send.
